basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant and Field Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Assistant & Field Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitg.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Assistant & Field Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit has been mentioned in the official notification. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms if applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc in Life Sciences/Agriculture with experience in plant phenotyping, physiology, and biochemistry; Higher Secondary with familiarity about agriculture in field.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: MSc in any branch of Life Sciences or Agriculture with experience in plant phenotyping, physiology, and biochemistry. The candidate should be ready to work in field location at Deoghar (Jharkhand). Field Assistant: Higher Secondary degree with familiarity about agriculture in field, and the candidate should be ready to work in field location at Deoghar (Jharkhand).

salary_details.details: Project Assistant: Rs. 20,000 per month Field Assistant: Rs. 10,000 per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_guwahati_: MSc in Life Sciences/Agriculture with experience in plant phenotyping, physiology, and biochemistry; Higher Secondary with familiarity about agriculture in field.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: MSc in any branch of Life Sciences or Agriculture with experience in plant phenotyping, physiology, and biochemistry. The candidate should be ready to work in field location at Deoghar (Jharkhand). Field Assistant: Higher Secondary degree with familiarity about agriculture in field, and the candidate should be ready to work in field location at Deoghar (Jharkhand).

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific age limit has been mentioned in the official notification. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms if applicable.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Rs. 20,000 per month Field Assistant: Rs. 10,000 per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant and Field Assistant posts is 18th July 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant and Field Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by IIT Guwahati. One vacancy is for the Project Assistant position and two vacancies are for the Field Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant position, candidates must hold an MSc degree in any branch of Life Sciences or Agriculture and possess experience in plant phenotyping, physiology, and biochemistry.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Field Assistant role?
faq.answer: The Field Assistant position requires a Higher Secondary degree with familiarity regarding agriculture in the field. Candidates must also be prepared to work at the field location.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification released by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant and Field Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month, while the Field Assistant will be paid Rs. 10,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant and Field Assistant roles at IIT Guwahati will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the selected candidates for these posts be posted?
faq.answer: Both Project Assistant and Field Assistant candidates should be ready to work in the field location at Deoghar, Jharkhand, as specified in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates will be conducted on 21st July 2026. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview on this date.
